sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106999" key="u(pattiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπ-αττῐκός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n106999.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">somewhat Attic,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">εἰρωνευτής</foreign> Timo <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0526.tlg004.perseus-grc1:25" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">25</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
